mnemonics.title: Span of a Set of Vectors
mnemonics.content: The span of a set of vectors is the set of all possible linear combinations of those vectors.

acronyms.expansion: Set of Possible linear combinations of vectors, Always Non-empty
acronyms.usage: To remember the definition of the span of a set of vectors.

visualTips.concept: Span of a Set of Vectors
visualTips.visualization: Imagine a set of vectors as a set of directions in space. The span of these vectors is the set of all possible destinations that can be reached by following these directions.

analogies.concept: Span of a Set of Vectors
analogies.analogy: The span of a set of vectors is like the set of all possible routes that can be taken to reach a destination. Just as there may be multiple routes to a destination, there may be multiple linear combinations of vectors that result in the same vector.
